source_intake_record.raw_question_text: For the nominal-\(\pi\) circuit of a transmission line shown in the <image>, the impedance \( Z = 100\angle 80^\circ \ \Omega \) and reactance \( X = 3300 \ \Omega \). The magnitude of the characteristic impedance of the transmission line, in \( \Omega \), is ___________. (Give the answer up to one decimal place.)

agent_assessment.rationale: The question clearly asks for the magnitude of characteristic impedance for the nominal-pi transmission-line circuit, and the expected answer is a numeric value. The image is required but is semantically clear: it shows the nominal-pi equivalent with series impedance Z and two shunt reactance branches X. Despite minor metadata inconsistencies, the text-image pair is understandable.
